title: Loki’s Shadow Over the Island
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Zoro, Nami, Unknown person #14, Luffy, Giants as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: 'They call it the kingdom of warland..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "It resides on the massive Isle of Elbaf."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "Hence its more common moniker:"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ohh! Straw hat!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: what?!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Luffy!! We've been lookin' everywhere for ya!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you guys just get it here?! Aha ha ha ha!! Glad you made it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Everything worked out in the end!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: "Elbaf, the land of giants."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "From the mighty trees to the gentle flowers... from sea, to sky, to land..."

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Elbaf is the greatest!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHAT THE?! ARE THEY RIDING ON A RAINBOW?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 'All life on this particular island is so huge, it takes one's breath away.'

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "To those who seek adventure, I concede it would be a great shame to turn away from this marvelous land..."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "However, if nothing else, I implore you to keep this one piece of advice in the back of your mind..."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Give us a go next!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Should you venture out and arrive on Elbaf's vast and mysterious soil, heed my simple warning."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "If I could only write one thing about this enticing nation, it would be this:"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "Do not linger there for too long."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: - Louis Arnot, Explorer

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The start of a giant adventure!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
